name: 44_Text_Classification_BERT_AGNews_DL
query: Hey! Unaweza kunisaidia kujenga mfumo wa uainishaji wa maandishi kwa kutumia mfano wa awali wa BERT kwenye seti ya data ya AG News? Anza kwa kupakia na kusindika data katika `src/data_loader.py` (ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele yoyote unayoweza na kufanya tokenization). Mara baada ya kumaliza, tafadhali hifadhi vigezo vya mfano wa BERT chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Tumia mfano wa BERT na hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji kwenye `results/results.txt`. Pia, onyesha matriki ya mkanganyiko kwa kutumia seaborn na ihifadhi kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Hatimaye, tengeneza Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo pamoja na matokeo yao ya uainishaji chini ya `results/`. Itakuwa nzuri ikiwa daftari hilo linaelezea jinsi kujifunza kwa uhamisho kulivyotumika na athari yake kwenye utendaji wa mfano. Vilevile, itakuwa vizuri ikiwa utekelezaji wako ni rahisi kubadilisha seti ya data, ikiwa ni pamoja na msimbo wa kufundisha tena BERT. Asante sana!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "AG News" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na tokenization.
Mfano wa "BERT" unatumika kwa uainishaji wa maandishi na vigezo vinahifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko ya matokeo ya uainishaji inaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na matokeo yao ya uainishaji chini ya `results`.

preferences.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kuelezea jinsi kujifunza kwa uhamisho kulivyotumika na athari yake kwenye utendaji wa mfano.
Onyesho la matriki ya mkanganyiko linapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya sampuli zilizowekwa sawa na zisizowekwa sawa.
Mfumo unapaswa kuruhusu kufundisha tena mfano wa "BERT" kwa urahisi na data mpya.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "AG News" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "AG News" dataset. It only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real dataset loading logic. There is no use of any library (such as `datasets`, `torchtext`, or `pandas`) to actually download or load the AG News dataset. The file is described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — essentially a stub, not a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na tokenization.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data preprocessing. It is a minimal placeholder/stub that only contains:
- A `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real data loading
- A `build_transforms()` function that returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` with no actual implementation
- No noise removal logic whatsoever
- No tokenization logic whatsoever (no BERT tokenizer, no text processing)

The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and a "placeholder," confirming it does not fulfill the actual requirement of performing data preprocessing including noise removal and tokenization.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "BERT" unatumika kwa uainishaji wa maandishi na vigezo vinahifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that `models/saved_models/` directory exists but is empty — no saved model files are present. The only source file (`src/data_loader.py`) is a minimal placeholder that does not implement any BERT model for text classification; it only contains stub functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) with no actual BERT-related code (no imports of `transformers`, `BertForSequenceClassification`, `BertTokenizer`, or any training/saving logic). There is no evidence of a BERT model being trained or its parameters saved under `models/saved_models/`.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/results.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual classification results. This indicates that the file was created but no real text classification results were saved to it. The requirement to store classification results in `results/results.txt` has not been meaningfully fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko ya matokeo ya uainishaji inaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha kwamba ilitengenezwa kwa kutumia **seaborn**. Zaidi ya hayo, jaribio la kusoma faili hilo lilisababisha hitilafu (error ya `BadRequestError`), maana yake maudhui halisi ya picha hayakuweza kuthibitishwa. Trajekta pia haikuonyesha amri yoyote ya `sns.heatmap()` au operesheni ya `savefig` iliyotekelezwa kwa mafanikio. Kwa hivyo, hitaji hili halijatimizwa kikamilifu.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na matokeo yao ya uainishaji chini ya `results`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows no Jupyter Notebook file anywhere in the workspace. The `results` directory only contains `results.txt` and `confusion_matrix.png` under `results\figures`. There is no `.ipynb` file present that would demonstrate an interactive notebook displaying input texts and their classification outputs. The only source file is `src/data_loader.py`, which itself is a minimal placeholder implementation that does not contain actual BERT-based text classification logic or notebook functionality.
